raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need grep -R "foo" /system; count lines. Use grep -R -n? just count. Command: grep -R "foo" /system | tee /dev/tty | wc -l? But need output to console then number. Use grep -R "foo" /system | tee /dev/tty | wc -l. That prints matches then count. But tee will duplicate to console. So final.
